title: MLOQI 2 Pack Scaffold Board Shelf Brackets with Lips, 5mm Thick Heavy Duty L Wall Brackets for Shelves, Black Industrial Shelves Support (8"x6"/20cm x 15cm)
features: 【Heavy Duty Shelf Brackets】: The L shaped shelf brackets with lip are made of premium quality solid steel at thickness 0.2"/5mm, which make it more sturdy and wont sag or bounce. Your shelves have a 45-75 KG weight capacity when properly mounted on the wall.

【Decorative & Practical】: Installing these black industrial brackets to anywhere in the house can make a modern style and save storage space. You can install them in the kitchen, bathroom, bars, office, farmhouse or anywhere needs open shelves and decor.
【Premium Quality & Durability】: Every single bracket is formed in one piece and quality checked with a 90 degree right-angle. Finished by black power coated to prevent rust and scratch.

【With Lips】：Each bracket is guaranteed to be straight, square, and of exceptional quality. The wall shelf bracket with lip, which aim to lock the board, prevent shelves slipping adding more confidence.
【Easy Installation】: No special skills are required to mount these open scaffold board shelf brackets on the wall. The screws you need to install the brackets are included in the package.
description: Product Description Heavy Duty Shelf Brackets Sturdy Brackets The shelf brackets with lip are made of premium quality solid steel at thickness 0.2"/5mm, which make it more sturdy and wont sag or bounce. Easy Installation No special skills are required to mount these open floating shelf brackets on the wall. Wide Use The shelf brackets can be installed in kitchen, bathroom, reading room, basement. Just several pieces of brackets and boards add large storage room and make your room stylish.
